items.title: Jay Huff suiting up for Team USA in World Cup qualifiers next month. Also, ex Pacers/adjacent Pedro Bradshaw, Terry Taylor, Gabe York, and Jarrod Uthoff.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Jay Huff suiting up for Team USA in World Cup qualifiers next month. Also, ex Pacers/adjacent Pedro Bradshaw, Terry Taylor, Gabe York, and Jarrod Uthoff.

items.title: Pacers center Jay Huff has been named to the USA World Cup Qualifying Team for next month.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers center Jay Huff has been named to the USA World Cup Qualifying Team for next month.

It also includes several former Pacers/Boom: Terry Taylor, Pedro Bradshaw, Jarrod Uthoff, Gabe York.

items.title: Are the Pacers convinced that Jay Huff and Micah Potter are the answers at the center spot behind Zubac?
items.author: Alex Golden
items.body_excerpt:
Are the Pacers convinced that Jay Huff and Micah Potter are the answers at the center spot behind Zubac? 

Here are 5 centers that I think the Pacers should consider in Free Agency to compete with Huff & Potter to be Bug Zu’s backup.

media.title: 5 Centers the Pacers Should Target in Free Agency to Address Their Backup Five Spot
media.description: The Indiana Pacers have a few question marks on their roster and the backup center spot is one of them. With the Pacers adding Ivica Zubac at the Trade Deadline
